name_cn:
Top quality original, complete packaging
Latest Dior summer denim series blue small size has shipped!!️
Dior D-Joybag denim has become a new star this year! The popularity is no less than any classic model, 😊 with the diamond element added to the previous design, the denim series was released, especially the matching color tree logo charm, which directly pushed the hype to the peak, starting a denim craze, a rare masterpiece only this one👍
Size;22.5*12*5.5cm
